title: Data Center Dynamos: 3 Stocks Powering the Information Age
text: The information age has produced many profitable companies. Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT ) and Apple (NASDAQ: AAPL ) entered the PC industry early with the latter capitalizing on smartphones as well.

title: Big Data, Big Bucks! 3.6% Yield And 10% Annual Return Potential With Digital Realty
text: The data storage market is projected to reach $800 billion by 2030, with a compound annual growth rate of 17.9%. Digital Realty Trust is a leading provider of data center solutions, positioned at the intersection of technology and real estate. DLR's unique concept of "Data Gravity" and emphasis on connectivity make it an attractive investment in the booming data storage market.

title: Digital Realty Trust: Generative AI Is Here To Stay - $400B TAM By 2027
text: DLR benefits from the increased domestic availability of AI chips, as its US operations drive its top and bottom line growth with increasing Average Base Rent per square foot. Demand continues to outstrip supply, with the REIT already reporting an accelerating same capital cash Net Operating Income growth of +9.4% in FQ3'23. The DLR management has made the prudent choice to engage on multiple partnerships for its Data Center expansions as well, minimizing its near-term liquidity risks at a time of uncertainties.

title: Let's Look Back on 3 Commercial Real Estate Trends That Emerged in 2023

title: These Dividend Stocks Are Joining Forces in a $7 Billion Deal to Capture a $1 Trillion Once-in-a-Generation Opportunity
text: Digital Realty is forming a joint venture with Blackstone to develop data centers. The deal will shift some of the capital commitment, freeing up more of the REIT's cash flow.

title: Digital Realty (DLR), Blackstone Unveil $7B Data Center Deal
text: Digital Realty's (DLR) strategic partnership with Blackstone positions the company for accelerated growth in the hyperscale data center market.

title: Digital Realty and Blackstone Announce $7 Billion Hyperscale Data Center Development Joint Venture
text: JV will deliver approximately 500 megawatts of IT capacity across three Tier 1 metros in Europe and North America AUSTIN, Texas and NEW YORK , Dec. 7, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Digital Realty (NYSE: DLR), the largest global provider of cloud- and carrier-neutral data center, colocation and interconnection solutions, and Blackstone Inc. (NYSE: BX) announced today that Blackstone-affiliated funds led by Infrastructure, Real Estate and Tactical Opportunities have agreed to establish a joint venture with Digital Realty to develop four hyperscale data center campuses across three metro areas on two continents.  The developments are expected to support approximately 500 megawatts (MW) of total IT load upon full build out of all campuses.
